description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("AV"), operating in manual mode, was traveling northbound on 25th Avenue between California Street and 
Clement Street. The AV operator improperly engaged from manual into autonomous mode while the AV was in motion, temporarily 
causing the AV to steer to the right. The AV operator then disengaged from autonomous mode into manual mode, and shortly thereafter, the 
AV made contact with an unoccupied and parked red Chrysler Voyager. This caused damage to the AV’s front passenger side bumper 
fascia. The AV operator left contact information for the other party and there were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
